text: Video thoracoscopy of the right lung shows evidence of endometriosis over the right hemidiaphragm.
A complete survey of the lung is performed and visualization of the apical lung shows extensive adhesions of the lung into the chest wall consistent with inflammation from endometriosis.
Adhesiolysis is performed and chocolate colored fluid consistent with old blood is evacuated.
Using the stapler segment of the right lung apex involved with endometriosis is resected.
